name: podcast
description: Generate Korean podcast episodes from any source (URLs, tweets, articles, PDFs) — analyzes content, writes a script, generates audio via OpenAI TTS, converts to MP4, and auto-uploads to YouTube. Use this skill whenever the user says 'make a podcast', 'convert to podcast', 'podcast', 'create an episode', 'turn this into audio', 'YouTube podcast', 'turn this article into a podcast', 'publish as audio', or provides sources and wants them transformed into a listenable format.
